response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced full-stack software engineer with an impressive 20-year background in web, mobile, and backend development. However, his profile does not align with the specific needs of a Principal Performance Architect focused on AI hardware. He lacks the required expertise in SoC and IP modeling, GPU architecture, deep-learning workload optimization, and hardware-software co-design for AI accelerators.
strengths: Over 20 years of diverse software engineering experience across web, backend, and embedded systems.
Strong architectural background with experience in building high-throughput microservices and scalable platforms.
Proven track record of technical leadership, open-source contributions, and organizing technical workshops.
concerns: Complete lack of required experience in SoC and IP modeling or hardware-software co-design.
No demonstrated background in performance analysis and optimization for deep-learning workloads or AI accelerators.
Missing preferred qualifications such as SIMD/MIMD and GPU architecture experience.
